description: 55M, HTN, LDL 165, ASCVD risk 8.5%. ACC/AHA primary prevention preempts USPSTF Grade C. ACC/AHA provides definitive COR I recommendation for moderate-to-high-intensity statin; USPSTF Grade C (shared decision-making) is superseded.

actions.label: Initiate moderate-to-high-intensity statin therapy
actions.rationale: ACC/AHA COR I, LOE A: adults 40-75 without diabetes, LDL 70-189 mg/dL, and 10-year ASCVD risk ≥7.5% should initiate moderate-to-high-intensity statin. Patient has LDL 165, ASCVD risk 8.5%. ACC/AHA preempts USPSTF Grade C (which would require shared decision-making) by providing more specific guidance.

actions.label: Optimize blood pressure management
actions.rationale: BP 142/88 mmHg is above target despite HTN diagnosis. No current antihypertensive on medication list. HTN is a modifiable CVD risk factor.
